textByHash.098fccf502e21e94011199d08e1c1d63dada4d4a: Watch out for scorpions though, they'll take a pop at you if you go too near them. To avoid them just follow the western fence as you travel south.
textByHash.0c79088a02292f15b58db030433222c8f236e913: If you're in the mood for a little rest and relaxation, there are a couple of nice fishing spots south of the town.
textByHash.0e2207a18292f1f04601f92f2292aa60a106d28d: The prices are better than the smell!
textByHash.392f9e4be1d5c8fb7e7006152e85006c2d5a0007: for the most stylish protection money can buy!
textByHash.3aaac48f747515b9164773856ee2b4bffbacc4e5: The flyer advertises the different shops you can find in Al Kharid.
textByHash.3c5efdb5ab04eb0ab5e571f6924dccaa3209aed9: Are you trying to be funny or has age turned your brain to mush? Look at the flyer you already have!
textByHash.4f946a51e64f4e762ca63299a9c26f8103598b02: I'd give you a flyer but it looks like your hands are full. Come back when you have space for my flyer.
textByHash.5102f1f1dbc76b0741f9a2c96f81ad35e48107bb: Well, Ali Morrisane isn't too popular with the other traders in Al Kharid, mainly because he's from Pollnivneach and they feel he has no business trading in their town.
textByHash.5da86a0510d912f9a4eee698f7e1669e0b8a832f: Keep west as you travel south ...
textByHash.804f772e811ed8890832dd574b5c3846aa0d792e: I still have hundreds of these flyers to hand out, I wonder if my boss would notice if I quietly dumped them somewhere?
textByHash.85392a391741f69c82aa0d035dee39c21e5f5146: Here! Take one and let me get back to work.
textByHash.8551803a718e07085d7a894831c68fe31bfcf25d: If you're here to make money, there is a mine to the south.
textByHash.8774ab66096d3d18734a46d9725e0e1b5d57c6a1: Of course I was! You can find him on the north edge of town.
textByHash.920451f3d1321f7352bc4479c45bf7142b96eb01: I think they're just sour because he's better at making money than them.
textByHash.a282e18b598ce429799e1798a74e0025c8d3e174: The place for all your crafting needs.
textByHash.a5fb31d94231131d84371bafaac7544199f8496c: Then why would I want it? Keep moving, I have to hand all these flyers out before I get paid.
textByHash.abd3a00c02e97f7576354efd545079eca0a9f022: I don't have time to talk right now! Ali Morrisane is paying me to hand out these flyers.
textByHash.b3838b1f9819b29258086838c5dc8b4d0c806710: Ali Morrisane is the greatest merchant in the east!
textByHash.bc392821054743337b17670b4e792458b7b15b20: with a Scimitar from Zeke's Superior Scimitars!
textByHash.c4906ec61d70b24e9a973eef61e8cce218a54092: Run your enemies through in style...
textByHash.c5d4c369decb7b9eb1f9ada77051c819d1a6eeb0: The finest store in the world!
textByHash.ce78b2d6a6efb3cd7b59543516eead50e4587727: I'm very busy, so listen carefully! I shall say this only once.
textByHash.d16dca38c9a09cea77f660b5982ca53e0326b4cd: It also entitles you to money off your next purchase in any of the shops listed on it. It's Ali's way of getting on the good side of the traders.
textByHash.fbed69e4eba9ec941b2f290308729c9533300805: Apart from a busy and wonderous market place in Al Kharid to the south, there is the Emir's Arena to the south-east where you can challenge other players to a fight.
